generated_files.probe: existing WPHX-312.60 grouped parser-helper probe expanded to include the WPHX-312.64 protected parse_url wrapper case

claims: The WPHX PHP emitter now honors @:wp.visibility on static methods and can emit protected static public-ABI methods.
The grouped original-path class-wp-http.php driver now includes protected WP_Http::parse_url alongside processResponse and chunkTransferDecode.
The generated shell passes PHP lint and oracle/candidate behavior probes for all three helper cases, including subclass parent::parse_url access.
The WPHX PHP emission manifest records class:WP_Http and no unsupported constructs for the protected-method grouped driver.
non_claims: This does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.
processHeaders, buildCookieHeader, header/cookie side effects, Requests transport behavior, installed WordPress behavior, and live transfer-encoding negotiation remain future gates.
The full WP_Http::request method remains deliberately later.
